name: Samty Co., Ltd.
summary: Samty Co., Ltd. engages in the real estate business in Japan. It plans, designs, develops, and manages condominiums; and leases and manages properties, such as apartments, office buildings, commercial facilities, hotels, and others. The company is also involved in the development and sale of land; and property holding, tenant recruitment, and property management businesses, as well as provision of construction and construction renovation services. In addition, it operates hotels; and offers asset management services. The company was formerly known as Samty Development Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Samty Co., Ltd. in June 2005. Samty Co., Ltd. was founded in 1982 and is headquartered in Osaka, Japan.
